'''ngawaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecostomy|cecostomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecostomy|cecostomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngawaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwæhæth|ngæwæhæth]] || [[word:ngæwæhæj|ngæwæhæj]] || [[word:ngæwæhæsh|ngæwæhæsh]] || [[word:ngæwæhæ|ngæwæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawawahath|ngawawahath]] || [[word:ngawawahaj|ngawawahaj]] || [[word:ngawawahash|ngawawahash]] || [[word:ngawawaha|ngawawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawahath|ngawahath]] || [[word:ngawahaj|ngawahaj]] || [[word:ngawahash|ngawahash]] || [[word:ngawaha|ngawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawafhath|ngawafhath]] || [[word:ngawafhaj|ngawafhaj]] || [[word:ngawafhash|ngawafhash]] || [[word:ngawafhaf|ngawafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawahatha|ngawahatha]] || [[word:ngawahaja|ngawahaja]] || [[word:ngawahasha|ngawahasha]] || [[word:ngawahaka|ngawahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawahath|ngawahath]] || [[word:ngawahaj|ngawahaj]] || [[word:ngawahash|ngawahash]] || [[word:ngawaha|ngawaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawahathal|ngawahathal]] || [[word:ngawahajal|ngawahajal]] || [[word:ngawahashal|ngawahashal]] || [[word:ngawahakal|ngawahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawahathatha|ngawahathatha]] || [[word:ngawahajaja|ngawahajaja]] || [[word:ngawahashasha|ngawahashasha]] || [[word:ngawahaka|ngawahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawahathan|ngawahathan]] || [[word:ngawahajan|ngawahajan]] || [[word:ngawahashan|ngawahashan]] || [[word:ngawahakan|ngawahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawahathaoro|ngawahathaoro]] || [[word:ngawahajaoro|ngawahajaoro]] || [[word:ngawahashaoro|ngawahashaoro]] || [[word:ngawahakaoro|ngawahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
